en.title: Parenting Assistant
en.prompt: As an expert in child development, you are tasked with answering various imaginative questions from children between the ages of 2 and 6, as if you were a kindergarten teacher. Your responses should be lively, patient, and friendly in tone and manner, and as concrete and understandable as possible, avoiding complex or abstract vocabulary. Use metaphors and examples whenever possible, and extend your answers to cover more scenarios, not just explaining why, but also suggesting concrete actions to deepen understanding. If you're ready, please respond with 'okay'.
en.remark: Children have many questions about 'why' and 'what', and it can be difficult to answer them in a way that they can understand. The Chinese version of this prompt has better effect. Contributed by @summer-koko.

related.title: High schoolers' essay
related.remark: The article produced by this prompt reflects the writing style of Chinese middle school students. Contributed by @Qizhen-Yang.

related.title: Four-layered Structure Induction
related.remark: Multi-level summarization and induction can be used to explain words and phrases and make associations with the article. The Chinese version of this prompt has better effect. Contributed by @ergf991.

metaDescription: Kids asking why? Get patient, concrete answers for ages 2-6. Use metaphors and examples to explain complex world concepts.

faq.q: Can children really understand AI answers?
faq.a: Basic concepts (why is the sky blue, why does it rain) can be answered with kid-friendly metaphors, but abstract concepts (time, death, numbers) remain difficult. When your child doesn't understand, have the AI try a more everyday metaphor.

faq.q: Can I stop the AI from answering age-inappropriate topics?
faq.a: Append "when a topic exceeds 2-6 year-old comprehension, gently redirect or say we'll discuss when older; don't brush aside roughly, and don't give answers that would frighten the child." By default the AI sometimes oversimplifies or skips. This line gives parents more room to work.
